name: image-edit
description: Edit an existing image from a text instruction (image-to-image) via the OpenAI Images edits API. The result shows directly in the chat.

configSchema.label: Provider
configSchema.hint: Which configured OpenAI-compatible provider to use (reuses its key + base URL). Add providers in Settings → Brain.

configSchema.label: Model
configSchema.hint: Pick from your configured models. Default: gpt-image-1.
